class.name: OcctlPrim
class.description: Auto-generated wrapper for the OCCT-Light C header occtl_prim.h.

method.name: const_OCCTL_PRIM_H
method.description: @file occtl_prim.h @brief OCCT-Light: primitives module public API umbrella. Include this header for the complete primitive construction surface, or include one of the family headers directly: - occtl_prim_solid.h : analytic solids and half-spaces. - occtl_prim_sketch.h : sketch wires, arcs, faces, and planar helpers. - occtl_prim_sweep.h : extrusions, revolutions, sweeps, lofts, offsets. - occtl_prim_feature.h : face recipes, sheet forming, and local features. /.
